channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How to watch Inoue vs Picasso: live stream boxing online, start time, ringwalks, fight card, PPV cost
item.description: All the ways to watch Inoue vs Picasso live streams online, including PPV options as the Monster defends his undisputed super bantamweight crown against El Rey.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: High severity flaw in MongoDB could allow memory leakage
item.description: Document database vendor MongoDB has advised customers to update immediately following the discovery of a flaw that could allow unauthenticated users to read uninitialized heap memory.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to watch Boxing Day Horse Racing 2025 for *FREE*
item.description: Here's our guide on how to watch all the Boxing Day horse racing with the King George VI Chase at Kempton headlining.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Acemagic just launched one of the weirdest-looking Ryzen AI Max+ 395 mini PCs to date - Tank M1A Pro+ supports 24TB storage, quad 8K screens and claims to match the RTX 4070M laptop GPU
item.description: Acemagic’s Tank M1A Pro+ joins the Ryzen AI Max+ 395 mini PC wave with support for four 8K screens, 128GB memory and up to 24TB SSD storage.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: 5 eye-opening Google Android app tricks from 2025
item.description: We talk about tons of tips for making the most of Android and tapping into all the software’s easily overlooked options, features, and shortcuts. But when it comes to real-world productivity, Google’s actual operating system is really only half the story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Virtual reality opens doors for older people to build closer connections in real life
item.description: Many retirement developments serve as a tranquil refuge for older people who can no longer travel to faraway places or engage in bold adventures.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Altman: Once upon a time, Google could have dominated OpenAI
item.description: The great power competition in the AI Age will probably be between OpenAI and Google, and one of the main battles may be over advertising dollars. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman seemed to describe the world in those terms during an appearance on the Big Technology podcast Monday.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: 4 ways the CIO role will expand in 2026
item.description: The CIO role is undergoing its most dramatic transformation in years. Technology leaders previously focused on digital transformation and cloud migration are now being handed responsibility for corporate sustainability, AI governance, and strategic platform consolidation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Pro-Russian hackers claim cyberattack on French postal service
item.description: French prosecutors say a pro-Russian hacking group has claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack on France’s national postal service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The 5 big events that shaped Microsoft’s 2025
item.description: This has been a pivotal 12 months for Microsoft, a year in which it faced increasing competition that threatened to knock the company off its perch as the world’s leader in AI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Rust vision group seeks enumeration of language design goals
item.description: To help the Rust language continue scaling across domains and usage levels, the Rust Vision Doc group recommends enumerating the design goals for evolving the language while also improving the crates package system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New SantaStealer malware is after your passwords and crypto
item.description: New SantaStealer malware reportedly threatens holiday shoppers with password theft. This Christmas-themed info-stealer targets browsers and crypto wallets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple fined $116 million in Italy
item.description: The Italian competition authority, Autorità Garante della Concorrenza e del Mercato, has fined Apple more than $116 million (€98.6 million) for abusing its dominant position in the market for app distribution to iOS users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google Cloud signs $10 billion deal with Palo Alto Networks
item.description: Google Cloud has signed a comprehensive cooperation agreement with cybersecurity company Palo Alto Networks. As part of the agreement, some of Palo Alto Networks’ current services will be moved to Google’s cloud platform. But it is also about offering new AI services to customers, Reuters reports.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google’s old assistant stays on Android for a while longer
item.description: In March, Computer Sweden reported that Google Assistant would be replaced by the AI tool Gemini in Android-based mobile phones before the new year. With just over a week to go until the end of the year, it is clear that this will not be the case.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Instacart ends a program where users could see different prices for the same item at the same store
item.description: Instacart is ending a program where customers saw different prices for the same product ordered at the same time from the same store.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 10 Android tips you shouldn’t miss from 2025
item.description: Ah, the holidays. No matter what manner of winter celebration you prefer (I’m a Festivus man myself), late December is a fine time for kickin’ back and collecting your thoughts for the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: FCC bans new Chinese-made drones, citing security risks
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission says it will ban new foreign-made drones, a move that will keep new Chinese-made drones out of the U.S. market.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang, Associated Press, Local 4
